overview: A cannabis-culture social platform with legitimate age verification, user profiles, social feed, Snapchat-style 24h stories, community groups, direct messaging, and an admin moderation panel — all wrapped in a green-and-black cannabis aesthetic.
features: Age verification gate with DOB validation (21+)
Internet Identity login and user profiles with avatar upload
Social feed with text and photo posts, likes, and comments
Explore/discover page with trending content and user suggestions
Community groups by topic (strains, culture, advocacy, news)
Admin moderation panel (manage users, posts, reports)
Green and black cannabis leaf aesthetic, mobile-responsive
